title: Blox AI POST /troubleshoot/phone-context request body
description: Phase 11 contract. The app submits this body via the BLE proxy when the user taps 'Share my phone's context' in the Diagnostics screen. Container looks up session by session_id (404 if expired/unknown), ingests phone_context into the model's prompt context as a virtual tool_result (INTERNAL — no SSE event emitted for this; Codex pre-impl Q8 catch — emitting on SSE would require expanding tool_result schema's closed shape with a `tool` field). Refreshes TTL on success.

phone_context.description: See phone_context.schema.json. Container MUST validate against that schema before ingest.
